doc_html:
CHAPTER 6. FANTASY SPORTS CONTESTS

§301. Title

            This Chapter shall be referred to as the "Louisiana Fantasy Sports Contests Act".

            Acts 2018, No. 322, §1.
doc_text:
CHAPTER 6.  FANTASY SPORTS CONTESTS
§301.  Title
This Chapter shall be referred to as the "Louisiana Fantasy Sports Contests Act".
Acts 2018, No. 322, §1.
